chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Acquittal Appeal No.619 of 2022 Date Orders with Signatures of Judges 1. For orders on MA No.12781/2022 2. For hearing of main case 30.05.2025. None present for appellant. Mr. Muhammad Ilyas Warraich, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 3. Ms. Amna Ansari, APG This acquittal appeal, presented in office on 26.10.2022, was lastly fixed in Court on 30.05.2023 when appellant was present in person and since then the appellant and his counsel did not make any effort to get the Appeal fixed in Court for hearing and decision. Even today, neither the appellant nor his counsel is in attendance. It appears that they have lost interest in the matter and not pursuing the Appeal diligently. This acquittal appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge
